faqs.q: Which university is GEC Jamui affiliated with?
faqs.a: GEC Jamui is affiliated with Aryabhatta Knowledge University, Patna.

faqs.q: What facilities are available on campus?
faqs.a: The campus includes classrooms, laboratories, a library, hostel facilities, and open spaces for student activities.

faqs.q: How is student life at GEC Jamui?
faqs.a: How is student life at GEC Jamui?

faqs.q: What is the goal of GEC Jamui?
faqs.a: The goal is to provide quality education and develop skilled engineers who can contribute to society and industry.
